author: 0xunclebill
content:
In the case of a reorg, I think there could be a situation where a the node doesnt have any bids to accept (since it had initially ignored bids that didnt initially meet its view of head). Probably not super important now, but if we want to eventually deprecate local block building we'll need to handle this edge case I think 

Our plan right now is to send non-canonical bids to a reprocess queue and in the case of re-org, process bids that now meet our new view of head

author: potuz
content: I think this is not necessary to address, bids will come for next and current slot

author: potuz
content: Thus some bids must match the current head view

author: potuz
content: Also it's very likely builders themselves will be sending different bids for different heads

author: potuz
content: As they currently build on top of different heads
